name: Burden of Proof Shifting Statement

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who receive a notification from the Secretary regarding a proposed deficiency involving the accumulated earnings tax.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can shift the burden of proof to the IRS in Tax Court regarding the reasonableness of accumulations by submitting a detailed statement of the grounds and facts for the retention.
